---
title: "Blog"
toc: true
listing:
  contents:
    - blog/in-praise-of-documentation/docs/talk.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

Welcome to the `care-code-connect` blog! 🤗

*"Revisioning data science for the age of AI"*

New posts will appear below!
